Title: Friendship in the Age of Loneliness: An Optimist's Guide to Connection
Author: Adam Smiley Poswolsky
My Review: It's been a hard year; this book is so timely! Friendship in the Age of Loneliness is chock full of helpful resources, interesting stories, vulnerable ideas, and much needed inspiration for connecting with friends - old and new - IN REAL LIFE. Full disclosure: I proofread this book. But having said that, I do hope you believe that that doesn't actually change my positive review of this well-written work. I've found this book personally helpful and, in fact, a pleasure to read multiple times. Thank you Smiley for giving voice to this important aspect of our culture today.
